narrative:
Washington Twp township has 3,376 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
